relevant_cases.verbatim_excerpt: A 60-year-old man with hypertension, dyslipidemia, and a family history of heart disease presented with 6 hours of moderate chest pain. He had a history of episodes of brief dull left shoulder pain over the preceding month
relevant_cases.relevance_notes: Intramyocardial dissecting hematoma after PCI with stenting - similar mechanism of coronary intervention complication with hematoma formation. Post-PCI complication with intramural hematoma.
